title.rendered: A Heartfelt Thank You from Travel FX

content.rendered:
Voting for the British Travel Awards 2025 has now closed, and we just want to say an enormous thank you to everyone who took the time to vote for Travel FX. 💙

Every vote means more than you might imagine. These awards are decided entirely by the public,  by people like you, and your support helps independent online businesses like ours stand tall alongside some of the biggest high street names in travel money.

Why Your Support Matters

As an online-only foreign exchange platform, we don’t have branches on every high street or the marketing budgets of our larger competitors. What we do have is an incredible community of travellers who trust us to deliver great value, outstanding service, and consistently competitive exchange rates.

Your votes remind us that we’re making a real difference, helping holidaymakers get more from their travel money, whether they’re heading off for a weekend break or the trip of a lifetime.

Being nominated for Best Foreign Exchange Retailer once again is something we’re incredibly proud of. Every year, these awards highlight the very best in the travel industry, and being recognised among them is a true honour.

What Happens Next

The winners of the British Travel Awards 2025 will be announced on 8th December, and we’re keeping everything crossed for a great result! 🤞

If you entered the BTA prize draw, the organisers will be contacting the lucky winners directly, we’re wishing you the very best of luck! 🍀

From All of Us — Thank You

On behalf of the whole Travel FX team, thank you for your continued loyalty, trust, and support. Whether you’ve been with us for years or this was your first time ordering with us, you’re the reason we do what we do.

Here’s to more amazing travel adventures  and to helping you get the best exchange rates wherever your next trip takes you.

💙 Team Travel FX

itemListElement.name: A Heartfelt Thank You from Travel FX

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
